items.title: neuroPULSE pricing clarification needed
items.summary: Monika is following up on the neuroPULSE device purchase after Dr. Deluca asked for pricing clarification on what the "$4,699+" includes. Needs response on whether to proceed.
items.actionNeeded: Review pricing details and respond to Monika about whether to move forward with neuroPULSE purchase.

items.title: Omi pendant shipping confirmed
items.summary: Ivan confirmed the Omi pendant order has been placed and will send tracking number. Training completed yesterday and team is deciding on Google account setup approach.
items.actionNeeded: FYI only — wait for tracking number and watch for delivery at Charlotte office.
